chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1393 of 2022 C. P. No. D – 1685 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge C. P. No. D-1393/2022 Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.581/2023 (151 CPC) 3. For hearing of main case C. P. No. D-1685/2018 Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.5544/2020 (Ex./A) 2. For orders on CMA No.5545/2020 (I Rule 10 CPC) 3. For orders on CMA No.8856/2018 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case 29.02.2024 Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Korai, Advocate for petitioner in C. P. No. D-1393/2022. M/s Raja Iftikhar Hussain Ansari and Muhammad Aslam Gadani, Advocate for intervenor. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- C. P. No. D-1393/2022 Learned Counsel for petitioner, under instructions, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. C. P. No. D-1685/2018 Mr. Abdul Naeem, Advocate, who is appearing for petitioner, is called absent and on his behalf Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Korai is holding brief. However, he has refused to argue the matter. Last diary shows that this case was adjourned as a last chance, despite that learned Counsel for petitioner has chosen to remain absent. In view of above, this petition is dismissed in non- prosecution. Office to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matter. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
